overview: This appears to be textured lungwort (Lobaria scrobiculata), a large foliose lichen. It is a cyanolichen, meaning it partners with cyanobacteria to fix nitrogen from the air. The species thrives in humid, cool, high-elevation habitats and grows on trees or rocks. It is sensitive to air pollution and vulnerable to grazing by snails and slugs. Wikipedia +3 4 sites Lobaria scrobiculata - Wikipedia
